stats.description: The percentage of a team's possessions that ends in an assist. Assist Ratio = (Assists x 100) divided by [(FGA + (FTA x 0.44) + Assists + Turnovers].

stats.name: offReboundRate

stats.name: turnoverRatio
stats.description: The percentage of a team's possessions that end in a turnover. Turnover Ratio = (Turnover x 100) divided by [(FGA + (FTA x 0.44) + Assists + Turnovers].

stats.name: brickIndex
stats.description: How many points a player costs his team with his shooting compared with the league average on a per-40-minute basis. ((52.8 - TS%) x (FGA + (FTA x 0.44))) / (Min/40) .

stats.name: usageRate
stats.description: the number of possessions a player uses per 40 minutes. Usage Rate = {[FGA + (FT Att. x 0.44) + (Ast x 0.33) + TO] x 40 x League Pace} divided by (Minutes x Team Pace)
